subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast migrated in the path of Truth! If thou didst but know how exalted and glorious is this station, verily thou wouldst rend thy garment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهاجر مع الحق اگر بدانی این مقام چه قدر بلند و ارجمند است البته گریبان را
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @call to action, @chastisement and requital
